flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Boise Bible College fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (50.0% → 31.6%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Boise Bible College fell 35% between 2021 and 2024 (45.8% → 30.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Boise Bible College rose 41% between 2021 and 2024 (40.0% → 56.2%).
